#license
# Code generated by ebmcodegen at https://github.com/on-keyday/brgen
project(ebm2ts)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/tool)
add_executable(ebm2ts
    "main.cpp"
)
target_precompile_headers(ebm2ts REUSE_FROM codegen_pch)
if(UNIX)
set_target_properties(ebm2ts PROPERTIES INSTALL_RPATH "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/tool")
endif()
target_link_libraries(ebm2ts ebm futils ebm_mapping)
install(TARGETS ebm2ts DESTINATION tool)
if ("$ENV{BUILD_MODE}" STREQUAL "web")
    target_compile_options(ebm2ts PUBLIC "-gsource-map")
    target_link_options(ebm2ts PUBLIC "-gsource-map" "--source-map-base" "http://localhost:8000/")
    install(FILES "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/tool/ebm2ts.wasm" DESTINATION tool)
    install(FILES "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/tool/ebm2ts.wasm.map" DESTINATION tool)
endif()
